title: ChatCommands-Fabric
description: Twitch Integration mod where chat can activate vanilla minecraft commands.
body:
There are only one quirk of this very first version and that is your twitch username doesn't save after you close the game. So you will need to go through and reenter it if you close the game or it crashes.

The mod comes with a default config file that gets loaded up automatically. Later version I will probably add effects and stuff and make it easier to create commands. Like a drop down menu and what not.
